title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that the AI agent industry has normalized unreliability, with compounding errors across multi-step workflows rendering agents non-functional despite high per-step accuracy. He advocates for prioritizing reliability and "taste" over raw performance, emphasizing the importance of dogfooding and proof-of-work validation in shipping agents that work on first deployment.
